## Pull request requirements

Use the repository PR template. The PR must include:

- Cavos integration feedback: what worked, what failed or was confusing, and
  which Cavos capabilities/docs would have made the work easier. Use `N/A` only
  with an explanation when the issue does not touch Cavos.
- Evidence for every acceptance criterion: command output, tests, screenshots,
  video, transaction hash, or reproducible steps as appropriate.
